messages.content: I want to report a found item

Oh, that's wonderful of you to report a found item! Thank you so much for helping keep our campus community connected with their belongings.

To help us log this item and hopefully reunite it with its owner, could you please tell me a bit about what you found?

What kind of item is it? For example, is it an electronic device, a piece of clothing, a set of keys, or something else?
hi i lost my iphone pro max

Oh dear, I'm so sorry to hear about your lost iPhone. That can be quite stressful, but please don't worry, we're here to help you get it back.

To help me log this report accurately and search for it, could you please tell me a little more about your iPhone Pro Max?

*   What **color** is it?
*   And do you remember the **last specific location** where you might have had it on campus?
i was iphone 17 pro max orange colour one and it was last remeber i kept on the sitting desk near library
Got it! I have noted those details. To complete your report, could you please tell me your Phone number?

✅ I've logged your LOST report for your iphone.

I searched all current found reports, but there's no match yet. I'll keep watching and let you know the moment one appears.

✅ Got it — I've logged your **LOST** report for your **iphone**.

I searched all current found reports, but no matching item has been found yet. I've safely logged your report and I'll keep watching and let you know the moment one appears.
i found a iphone pro max near library orange colour
Got it! I have noted those details. To complete your report, could you please tell me your Phone number?

✅ I've logged your FOUND report for your iphone.

Great news — I also found a possible match among our current lost reports.

| Item | Location | Match Score | Contact Details | Why it matches |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| iphone | library | 67% | Name: Anish Kumar, Phone: 020929383, Email: anish@student.edu | Highly similar item names. Some description overlap. Location overlap. Category matches. Color matches. Brand matches. |

Please review these carefully. I'll keep these matches connected while you confirm details.
I want to report a found item

Thank you for letting us know! That's very kind of you to report a found item. We'll do our best to reunite it with its owner.

Could you please tell me a little more about the item you found? What kind of item is it?
i want to register a new report i lost my redmi note 9 phone i am attaching a photo also

Oh no, I'm so sorry to hear you've lost your Redmi Note 9 phone. That sounds really distressing, and I understand how important your phone is.

Thank you for letting me know you're attaching a photo – while I can't view images directly, the description you provide will be incredibly helpful.

To help me log this lost item report for your Redmi Note 9, could you please tell me your full name and your student ID (or email address if you don't have your student ID handy)? This will allow us to formally register the report and connect you if your phone is found.

✅ Got it — I've logged your **FOUND** report for your **iphone**.

Great news — I also found a possible match among our current lost reports:

| Item | Location | Match Score | Contact Details | Why it matches |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| iphone | library | 64% | Name: Anish Kumar, Phone: 020929383, Email: anish@student.edu | Highly similar item names. Some description overlap. Location overlap. Category matches. Color matches. Brand matches. |

Please review these carefully. I've safely logged your report, so we'll keep these matches connected while you confirm the details.

I want to report a found item

That's wonderful — thank you for taking the time to help someone get their item back! 😊

Could you tell me what you found? Just a short description is fine to start.
i found this phone

Thank you for reporting a found phone! Let's get it back to its owner together. 📱

Could you tell me a little more about it? For example:
- What color is it?
- Do you see a brand or model (like iPhone, Samsung, etc.)?
- Does it have a case? If so, what kind?

Any little detail helps us match it with the right person.
you can see that from the image i uploaded andh 9928390293 is my number

Thank you for sharing your number! I appreciate it. 🙏

Just so you know, I'll need a couple more pieces of information to safely log your report:
- **Your full name**
- **Your student ID** (or email address if you don't have your ID handy)

Also, I don't have the ability to view uploaded images on my end — could you describe the phone for me instead? Things like color, brand, model, or any case details would be really helpful. 😊

✅ Got it — I've logged your **FOUND** report for your **phone**.
